title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama CLI and server that lets you pull, build, and run large language models locally with a simple API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, wrapping the REST API with an intuitive synchronous and async interface.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers, providing typed wrappers around Ollama’s REST endpoints.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that adds Ollama models as LLM and chat components for building RAG and agent workflows.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (now renamed Open WebUI) offering chat, model management, RAG, and multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builders, streaming, and Spring Boot starters on Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem for interacting with the Ollama API, supporting generate and chat endpoints.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Lightweight Go CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API for quick model pulls and prompts from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline code completions.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator nodes for building semantic search pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes showing how to run Ollama with Docker Compose, GPU acceleration, and cloud deployments.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selectors and persistent storage.

title: ollama-nim
summary: Nim language client for Ollama with async HTTP and JSON streaming, installable via Nimble.

title: ollama-dart
summary: Dart/Flutter package exposing Ollama endpoints for mobile and desktop apps with code generation.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama API with Tokio and serde.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# SDK for .NET 6+ with System.Text.Json and HttpClient, available on NuGet.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands and threads.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that bridges channels or DMs to Ollama models with streaming replies and thread support.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a local AI assistant pane using Ollama for note summarization and Q&A.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server exposing Ollama as a tool for AI agents, enabling function-calling with local models.
